# Foyer

> Foyer is a voice sales agent for websites. It answers visitor questions using on-site content, navigates the page in real time, captures leads, and is installed with a single embed snippet.

## Primary URLs
- Homepage: https://tryfoyer.ai/
- App: https://app.tryfoyer.ai/
- Sign up: https://app.tryfoyer.ai/dashboard/signup
- Sign in: https://app.tryfoyer.ai/dashboard/signin

## Product Summary
- Voice sales agent for websites
- Real-time page navigation during conversations
- Lead capture and transcript logging
- Multilingual conversations across 30+ languages with automatic switching when a visitor speaks a different language (Starter+ plans)
- Dashboard for agents, conversations, leads, and billing

## Pricing Summary
- Free: $0/month, 100 minutes, 1 agent, single language
- Starter: $79/month, 800 minutes, 3 agents, multilingual auto-switching, custom branding
- Growth: $299/month, 5,000 minutes, unlimited agents, multilingual mode, Slack/webhook integrations

## Supported Languages
- English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Dutch, Polish, Czech, Swedish, Turkish, Arabic, Hindi, Mandarin Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Ukrainian, Romanian, Slovak, Finnish, Danish, Greek, Filipino, Indonesian, Malay, Norwegian, Hungarian, Bulgarian, Croatian (and more)

## Installation
- Add the widget script from the app after creating an agent
- Supported on Webflow, WordPress, Shopify, Framer, React, and plain HTML

## Contact
- Email: hello@tryfoyer.ai
